vig_removal_method: No-vig probs from best book (tighter margin wins). EV gate requires: (a) EV > threshold vs raw odds AND (b) model_prob > novig_market_prob (genuine edge vs fair value). Payout uses raw odds. v2 used raw-odds EV only, inflating edge by ~4-5%.
clv_method: First vs last snapshot per game day as pick-time/closing line proxies. CLV = novig_close - novig_open in model favor. 1 snapshot/day available — CLV shows line disagreement, not movement. Inconclusive until 2+ snapshots/day in production.

data_quality_finding.evidence: Games at e.g. HOU +2500 vs TEX show 50% home win rate vs 10% market-implied. Raw DK file shows HOU -122. Run-line prices (dk_rl_home_price) assigned to h2h fields.
data_quality_finding.impact: Phantom EV of 20-40% on big-dog bets drives unrealistic ROI. These rows excluded by odds sanity filter (|odds|<=500) for honest measurement.
data_quality_finding.fix_required: Data engineer: audit load_historical_odds.py join and rebuild games_v1_processed.parquet

honest_roi.filter: sane odds (|odds|<=500), vig-removed edge gate, 2024 holdout

moneyline.assessment: POTENTIALLY REAL but at upper end of plausible. Needs clean odds data to confirm.

run_line.assessment: BASE-RATE ECHO. Model outputs ~36% home cover (league avg). Market novig averages ~50%. Model bets away 96% of games collecting the 64% away base rate as if it were edge. NOT real alpha.

totals.assessment: HIGH WIN RATE SUSPICIOUS. 72% WR at 8% EV on 282 picks would be extraordinary alpha. Likely artifact of totals model concentrating bets on high base-rate outcomes (over/under lines near historical average).

clv_results.caveat: Single snapshot per day — not true pick-time vs close. Results measure disagreement vs morning line, not line movement.

moneyline.interpretation: Model disagrees with morning line by avg 2.19% in favored direction. Not confirmed edge — needs intra-day snapshots.

run_line.interpretation: No edge signal. Negative CLV consistent with base-rate echo.

run_line_v3_design_spec.current_problem: v2 model predicts P(home_cover) = 0.36 for nearly all games = league average. Market prices each game correctly at 30-70% home cover depending on matchup. Model has no game-specific information beyond base rate.
run_line_v3_design_spec.expected_base_rate: Regress on: pitcher FIP gap (home vs away), park_run_factor, bullpen_load_diff, posted_total_line. Gives game-specific expected cover rate.
run_line_v3_design_spec.model_output: Delta from neutral. Add to global_base_rate (0.353) for final P(home_cover).
run_line_v3_design_spec.success_condition: Mean CLV > +1% on 2+ snapshots/day AND ROI 2-8% at 4% EV threshold.
run_line_v3_design_spec.status: DESIGN ONLY — not trained in v3 (time budget). Keep v2 model but gate out run_line picks in pipeline until v3 trains successfully.

deploy_decision.status: CONDITIONAL — deploy worker (pipeline gate handles pick quality)
deploy_decision.rationale: Moneyline ROI 8.4% at 4% EV is within realistic range (not phantom). Run-line and totals excluded by 8%/Tier5 gate (base-rate echo). Moneyline at 8% EV threshold (10.4% ROI, 713 picks) is borderline — reconfirm after data engineer fixes odds corruption and re-runs backtest.
deploy_decision.gate_active: 8% EV / Tier 5 in pick-pipeline/index.ts until honest ROI reconfirmed on clean data
deploy_decision.next_step: data engineer fix odds corruption → re-run backtest → if moneyline ROI 2-8% at 4% EV → loosen gate to 4%/Tier3

known_weaknesses: Odds corruption (~8% of rows): dk_ml_home has run-line prices — inflates phantom EV
Single snapshot/day: CLV harness cannot detect intra-day line movement until production
Run-line: v2 model is base-rate echo — no game-specific edge — must use deviation-from-base-rate architecture
Totals: 72% win rate at 8% EV threshold is implausible alpha — likely another base-rate concentration artifact
Moneyline: market_implied_prob_home is a feature — model may be over-relying on it rather than finding independent signal
All markets: 2-season training (2022+2023) — thin data; v3 should add 2021
